name: Vitest Testing Framework
description: Set up Vitest from scratch: TypeScript support, V8 coverage reports, path aliases, and a sample test. Runs 10x faster than Jest on cold starts.

steps.description: Check existing test framework and TypeScript config
Read TypeScript config for path aliases
Install Vitest, coverage provider, and UI
Create config with coverage thresholds (80%), include patterns, and path aliases
Add test, test:watch, test:ui, and coverage scripts
Create sample test demonstrating describe/it/expect patterns
Verify test suite runs and passes

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Blazing fast unit tests with TypeScript, coverage, and watch mode
